since_last: 44% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.27%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 44% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.72% · BTC -1.29% · Gold -0.32% · Nasdaq100 +1.26%. 44% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.27%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.27%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.11%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -5.84%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +2.61%, NOW +2.55%, SAP +2.42%, CRM +2.02%, CRWD +1.67%. Laggards: MU -5.84%, ZBRA -5.23%, MRVL -5.12%, LRCX -5.08%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.87% at $157.43
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.87% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
